children.heading: Limitation on application of provisions relating to group health plans
children.label: a Limitation on application of provisions relating to group health plans
A
children.text: subject to paragraph (2), in the case of a plan that is a nonfederal governmental plan, and

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to health insurance coverage offered in connection with a group health plan (including such a plan that is a church plan or a governmental plan).

children.heading: Election to be excluded
children.label: A Election to be excluded
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (D) or (E), if the plan sponsor of a nonfederal governmental plan which is a group health plan to which the provisions of subparts 1 and 2 otherwise apply makes an election under this subparagraph (in such form and manner as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe), then the requirements of such subparts insofar as they apply directly to group health plans (and not merely to group health insurance coverage) shall not apply to such governmental plans for such period except as provided in this paragraph.1

children.label: i
children.text: for a single specified plan year, or

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of a plan provided pursuant to a collective bargaining agreement, for the term of such agreement.

children.label: i
children.text: notice to enrollees (on an annual basis and at the time of enrollment under the plan) of the fact and consequences of such election, and

children.label: ii
children.text: certification and disclosure of creditable coverage under the plan with respect to enrollees in accordance with section 2701(e).1

children.heading: Election not applicable to requirements concerning genetic information
children.label: D Election not applicable to requirements concerning genetic information
children.text: The election described in subparagraph (A) shall not be available with respect to the provisions of subsections (a)(1)(F), (b)(3), (c), and (d) of section 2702 and the provisions of sections 2701 and 2702(b) to the extent that such provisions apply to genetic information.111

children.heading: Election not applicable
children.label: E Election not applicable
children.text: The election described in subparagraph (A) shall not be available with respect to the provisions of subparts I and II.

children.label: I
children.text: no election described in subparagraph (A) with respect to may be made on or after ; andsection 300gg–26 of this titleDecember 29, 2022

children.label: II
children.text: except as provided in clause (ii), no such election with respect to expiring on or after the date that is 180 days after , may be renewed.section 300gg–26 of this titleDecember 29, 2022

children.heading: Exception for certain collectively bargained plans
children.label: ii Exception for certain collectively bargained plans
children.text: Notwithstanding clause (i)(II), a plan described in subparagraph (B)(ii) that is subject to multiple agreements described in such subparagraph of varying lengths and that has an election described in subparagraph (A) with respect to in effect as of , that expires on or after the date that is 180 days after , may extend such election until the date on which the term of the last such agreement expires.section 300gg–26 of this titleDecember 29, 2022December 29, 2022

children.heading: Exception for certain benefits
children.label: b Exception for certain benefits
children.text: The requirements of subparts 1 and 2 and part D shall not apply to any individual coverage or any group health plan (or group health insurance coverage) in relation to its provision of excepted benefits described in .1section 300gg–91(c)(1) of this title

children.heading: Exception for certain benefits if certain conditions met
children.label: c Exception for certain benefits if certain conditions met
A
children.text: are provided under a separate policy, certificate, or contract of insurance; or

children.label: B
children.text: are otherwise not an integral part of the plan.

children.label: A
children.text: The benefits are provided under a separate policy, certificate, or contract of insurance.

children.label: B
children.text: There is no coordination between the provision of such benefits and any exclusion of benefits under any group health plan maintained by the same plan sponsor.

children.label: C
children.text: Such benefits are paid with respect to an event without regard to whether benefits are provided with respect to such an event under any group health plan maintained by the same plan sponsor or, with respect to individual coverage, under any health insurance coverage maintained by the same health insurance issuer.

children.heading: Supplemental excepted benefits
children.label: 3 Supplemental excepted benefits
children.text: The requirements of this part and part D shall not apply to any individual coverage or any group health plan (and group health insurance coverage) in relation to its provision of excepted benefits described in section 300gg–91(c)(4) of this title if the benefits are provided under a separate policy, certificate, or contract of insurance.1

children.heading: Treatment as a group health plan
children.label: 1 Treatment as a group health plan
children.text: Any plan, fund, or program which would not be (but for this subsection) an employee welfare benefit plan and which is established or maintained by a partnership, to the extent that such plan, fund, or program provides medical care (including items and services paid for as medical care) to present or former partners in the partnership or to their dependents (as defined under the terms of the plan, fund, or program), directly or through insurance, reimbursement, or otherwise, shall be treated (subject to paragraph (2)) as an employee welfare benefit plan which is a group health plan.

children.heading: Employer
children.label: 2 Employer
children.text: In the case of a group health plan, the term “employer” also includes the partnership in relation to any partner.

children.label: A
children.text: in connection with a group health plan maintained by a partnership, an individual who is a partner in relation to the partnership, or

children.label: B
children.text: in connection with a group health plan maintained by a self-employed individual (under which one or more employees are participants), the self-employed individual,
